title: Bio-OM Expert Skill Manifest
description: Defines a skill that Bio-OM Expert can orchestrate. Each skill wraps a Claude Code invocation for content operations.

name.description: Machine-readable skill identifier. Use kebab-case, e.g. 'web-research'.

display.description: Human-readable skill name shown in the UI. Chinese preferred.

description.description: One-line description of what this skill produces. Used in the orchestration plan.
examples: 搜索最新行业研究和学术论文

trigger_patterns.description: Keywords and phrases that trigger this skill. Matched case-insensitively against user input.

cli_invoke.description: Template for invoking this skill via Claude Code. Use {param_name} placeholders for dynamic values. The orchestrator fills these from user input context.

estimated_time.description: User-facing estimate of how long this skill takes to run.

depends_on.description: Skills that must run before this one. Use '|' for alternatives (e.g. 'web-research | local-research'). Dependencies run in order, before this skill.

required_args.description: Arguments this skill expects from user input or upstream skills.
